# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart for our application deployment without resource limits or requests. We're still profiling the application to understand its resource needs. Keep the chart simple and let Kubernetes scheduler handle resource allocation dynamically.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
name: my-app
description: A simple Helm chart for deploying my application
type: application
version: 0.1.0
appVersion: "1.0"

dependencies: []

templates:
  deployment.yaml: |
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    metadata:
      name: {{ .Release.Name }}
      labels:
        app: {{ .Release.Name }}
    spec:
      replicas: 1
      selector:
        matchLabels:
          app: {{ .Release.Name }}
      template:
        metadata:
          labels:
            app: {{ .Release.Name }}
        spec:
          containers:
            - name: {{ .Release.Name }}
              image: "your-image:latest"
              ports:
                - containerPort: 80

  service.yaml: |
    apiVersion: v1
    kind: Service
    metadata:
      name: {{ .Release.Name }}
    spec:
      selector:
        app: {{ .Release.Name }}
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 80
          targetPort: 80
      type: ClusterIP

  NOTES.txt: |
    Your application has been deployed!
    You can access it at http://<your-service-ip>:80
